title: No concurrency protection for adapter state
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c (entire adapter struct)
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/include/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.h:257-268

The lichen_meshtastic_adapter struct contains mutable state (stats, stream_buf, from_radio_id, disconnected) that could be accessed concurrently:

1. lichen_meshtastic_adapter_feed_stream() from RX interrupt/thread
2. lichen_meshtastic_adapter_emit_text() from TX thread  
3. lichen_meshtastic_adapter_get_stats() from monitoring thread

There are no synchronization primitives (mutex, spinlock, atomic).

For embedded use cases, callers may serialize access externally, but:
1. This requirement should be documented in the header
2. Stats counters (especially increment operations) could use atomic types

Consider adding a note to adapter.h documenting thread-safety requirements.
